sourceTitle: Use of Generative AI Tools in Assessment: Guidance for ANU Law Students
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Using AI to improve expression in your own draft, such as grammar, clarity, or structure. Prompting AI for ideas or to help brainstorm — provided you verify all information independently.
evidenceLocator: Section: What May Be Permitted (with Caution)
